    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Flow model: one TCP flow keyed by 5-tuple.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nimport json\r\n\r\nfrom pydantic import BaseModel, Field\r\n\r\n\r\nclass Flow(BaseModel):\r\n    \"\"\"A single TCP flow with timing, byte counts, and optional RTT/concurrency.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    flow_id: str\r\n    capture_file_id: str\r\n    src_ip: str\r\n    src_port: int\r\n    dst_ip: str\r\n    dst_port: int\r\n    protocol: int = 6  # TCP\r\n    # Initiator = side that sent first SYN (client)\r\n    client_ip: str = Field(description=\"IP of the initiator (client)\")\r\n    client_port: int = Field(description=\"Port of the initiator\")\r\n    server_ip: str = Field(description=\"IP of the responder (server)\")\r\n    server_port: int = Field(description=\"Port of the responder\")\r\n    start_ts: float = Field(description=\"First packet timestamp (Unix)\")\r\n    end_ts: float = Field(description=\"Last packet timestamp (Unix)\")\r\n    duration_sec: float = Field(description=\"end_ts - start_ts\")\r\n    bytes_client_to_server: int = 0\r\n    bytes_server_to_client: int = 0\r\n    packet_count_c2s: int = 0\r\n    packet_count_s2c: int = 0\r\n    estimated_rtt_ms: float | None = None\r\n    concurrency_timeline: list[tuple[float, int]] | None = Field(\r\n        default=None,\r\n        description=\"(bucket_start_ts, active_flow_count) per bucket\",\r\n    )\r\n\r\n    def to_jsonl_line(self) -> str:\r\n        \"\"\"One-line JSON for JSONL output.\"\"\"\r\n        return json.dumps(self.model_dump(mode=\"json\"))\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "ebc617a1058df5ff394838ff8fde345a74b9b47fb8e3193356ec5de33bac3bd6",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Transaction model: one HTTP/gRPC request-response or stream.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nimport json\r\n\r\nfrom pydantic import BaseModel, Field\r\n\r\n\r\nclass Transaction(BaseModel):\r\n    \"\"\"One application-layer transaction (HTTP/1.1, HTTP/2 stream, or gRPC call).\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    txn_id: str\r\n    flow_id: str\r\n    protocol: str = Field(description=\"http1 | http2 | grpc\")\r\n    method: str | None = None\r\n    authority: str | None = None  # Host for HTTP/1.1, :authority for HTTP/2\r\n    path: str | None = None\r\n    status_code: int | None = None\r\n    stream_id: int | None = None\r\n    request_ts: float | None = None\r\n    response_ts: float | None = None\r\n    end_ts: float | None = None\r\n    latency_ms: float | None = Field(default=None, description=\"response_ts - request_ts in ms\")\r\n    request_bytes: int = 0\r\n    response_bytes: int = 0\r\n    grpc_service: str | None = None\r\n    grpc_method: str | None = None\r\n    message_sizes: list[int] | None = None  # gRPC message lengths from framing\r\n\r\n    def to_jsonl_line(self) -> str:\r\n        \"\"\"One-line JSON for JSONL output.\"\"\"\r\n        return json.dumps(self.model_dump(mode=\"json\"))\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "6a465b8d16f4d89990bf475760936c5c8ac15495fcf7e3f056eb192ffab59df9",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"

        },

        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Build summary.json from flows and transactions.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom collections import defaultdict\r\n\r\nfrom netprof.models.flow import Flow\r\nfrom netprof.models.summary import (\r\n    LatencyPercentiles,\r\n    Summary,\r\n    TopDestination,\r\n    TopTalker,\r\n)\r\nfrom netprof.models.transaction import Transaction\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _percentile(sorted_values: list[float], p: float) -> float | None:\r\n    if not sorted_values:\r\n        return None\r\n    k = (len(sorted_values) - 1) * p / 100.0\r\n    f = int(k)\r\n    c = f + 1 if f + 1 < len(sorted_values) else f\r\n    return (\r\n        sorted_values[f] + (k - f) * (sorted_values[c] - sorted_values[f])\r\n        if c > f\r\n        else sorted_values[f]\r\n    )\r\n\r\n\r\ndef build_summary(\r\n    flows: list[Flow],\r\n    transactions: list[Transaction],\r\n    top_talkers_n: int = 10,\r\n    top_destinations_n: int = 10,\r\n    top_ports_n: int = 10,\r\n) -> Summary:\r\n    \"\"\"Compute aggregate stats from flows and transactions.\"\"\"\r\n    total_flows = len(flows)\r\n    total_bytes = sum(f.bytes_client_to_server + f.bytes_server_to_client for f in flows)\r\n    total_transactions = len(transactions)\r\n\r\n    # Top talkers: by IP, aggregate bytes sent/recv (as client or server)\r\n    ip_bytes_sent: dict[str, int] = defaultdict(int)\r\n    ip_bytes_recv: dict[str, int] = defaultdict(int)\r\n    for f in flows:\r\n        ip_bytes_sent[f.client_ip] += f.bytes_client_to_server\r\n        ip_bytes_recv[f.client_ip] += f.bytes_server_to_client\r\n        ip_bytes_sent[f.server_ip] += f.bytes_server_to_client\r\n        ip_bytes_recv[f.server_ip] += f.bytes_client_to_server\r\n    talkers = [\r\n        TopTalker(ip=ip, bytes_sent=ip_bytes_sent[ip], bytes_recv=ip_bytes_recv[ip])\r\n        for ip in sorted(set(ip_bytes_sent) | set(ip_bytes_recv))\r\n    ]\r\n    talkers.sort(key=lambda t: t.bytes_sent + t.bytes_recv, reverse=True)\r\n    top_talkers = talkers[:top_talkers_n]\r\n\r\n    # Top destinations: server endpoint (server_ip:port), bytes_sent to it, flow_count\r\n    dest_bytes: dict[str, int] = defaultdict(int)\r\n    dest_flows: dict[str, int] = defaultdict(int)\r\n    for f in flows:\r\n        key = f\"{f.server_ip}:{f.server_port}\"\r\n        dest_bytes[key] += f.bytes_client_to_server\r\n        dest_flows[key] += 1\r\n    dests = [\r\n        TopDestination(target=k, bytes_sent=dest_bytes[k], flow_count=dest_flows[k])\r\n        for k in sorted(dest_bytes.keys())\r\n    ]\r\n    dests.sort(key=lambda d: d.bytes_sent, reverse=True)\r\n    top_destinations = dests[:top_destinations_n]\r\n\r\n    # Top ports: destination port, count of flows\r\n    port_count: dict[int, int] = defaultdict(int)\r\n    for f in flows:\r\n        port_count[f.server_port] += 1\r\n    top_ports = [\r\n        {\"port\": p, \"count\": port_count[p]}\r\n        for p in sorted(port_count.keys(), key=lambda p: -port_count[p])[:top_ports_n]\r\n    ]\r\n\r\n    # Active flow peaks: max concurrent in any bucket\r\n    active_flow_peaks = 0\r\n    for f in flows:\r\n        if f.concurrency_timeline:\r\n            for _ts, count in f.concurrency_timeline:\r\n                if count > active_flow_peaks:\r\n                    active_flow_peaks = count\r\n\r\n    # Latency percentiles from transactions with latency_ms\r\n    latencies = [t.latency_ms for t in transactions if t.latency_ms is not None]\r\n    latencies.sort()\r\n    p50 = _percentile(latencies, 50)\r\n    p90 = _percentile(latencies, 90)\r\n    p99 = _percentile(latencies, 99)\r\n    latency_percentiles = LatencyPercentiles(p50_ms=p50, p90_ms=p90, p99_ms=p99)\r\n\r\n    return Summary(\r\n        total_flows=total_flows,\r\n        total_bytes=total_bytes,\r\n        total_transactions=total_transactions,\r\n        top_talkers=top_talkers,\r\n        top_destinations=top_destinations,\r\n        top_ports=top_ports,\r\n        active_flow_peaks=active_flow_peaks,\r\n        latency_percentiles=latency_percentiles,\r\n    )\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "8567127492c0404491fb5385ba82f1ecd33d1697afbe1eba52b4fa91ac78a88c",

    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Generate human-readable profile.md report.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom netprof.models.summary import Summary\r\nfrom netprof.models.transaction import Transaction\r\n\r\n\r\ndef build_profile_md(summary: Summary, transactions: list[Transaction]) -> str:\r\n    \"\"\"Build markdown report with overview, tables, and behavior profile.\"\"\"\r\n    lines = [\"# Network Behavior Profile\", \"\"]\r\n\r\n    # Overview\r\n    lines.append(\"## Overview\")\r\n    lines.append(\"\")\r\n    lines.append(f\"- **Total flows:** {summary.total_flows}\")\r\n    lines.append(f\"- **Total bytes:** {summary.total_bytes}\")\r\n    lines.append(f\"- **Parsed transactions (HTTP/gRPC):** {summary.total_transactions}\")\r\n    lines.append(f\"- **Active flow peak (concurrent):** {summary.active_flow_peaks}\")\r\n    lines.append(\"\")\r\n\r\n    # Top endpoints (from transactions: path + method)\r\n    if transactions:\r\n        endpoint_counts: dict[str, int] = {}\r\n        for t in transactions:\r\n            key = f\"{t.method or '?'} {t.path or '?'}\"\r\n            endpoint_counts[key] = endpoint_counts.get(key, 0) + 1\r\n        sorted_endpoints = sorted(endpoint_counts.items(), key=lambda x: -x[1])[:15]\r\n        lines.append(\"## Top Endpoints\")\r\n        lines.append(\"\")\r\n        lines.append(\"| Method | Path | Count |\")\r\n        lines.append(\"|--------|------|-------|\")\r\n        for method_path, count in sorted_endpoints:\r\n            parts = method_path.split(\" \", 1)\r\n            method = parts[0]\r\n            path = parts[1] if len(parts) > 1 else \"\"\r\n            lines.append(f\"| {method} | {path} | {count} |\")\r\n        lines.append(\"\")\r\n\r\n        # Status codes\r\n        status_counts: dict[int, int] = {}\r\n        for t in transactions:\r\n            if t.status_code is not None:\r\n                status_counts[t.status_code] = status_counts.get(t.status_code, 0) + 1\r\n        if status_counts:\r\n            lines.append(\"## Status Codes\")\r\n            lines.append(\"\")\r\n            lines.append(\"| Code | Count |\")\r\n            lines.append(\"|------|-------|\")\r\n            for code, count in sorted(status_counts.items(), key=lambda x: -x[1]):\r\n                lines.append(f\"| {code} | {count} |\")\r\n            lines.append(\"\")\r\n\r\n    # Latency percentiles\r\n    lines.append(\"## Latency Percentiles (parsed HTTP/gRPC)\")\r\n    lines.append(\"\")\r\n    lp = summary.latency_percentiles\r\n    lines.append(f\"- **p50:** {lp.p50_ms:.2f} ms\" if lp.p50_ms is not None else \"- **p50:** N/A\")\r\n    lines.append(f\"- **p90:** {lp.p90_ms:.2f} ms\" if lp.p90_ms is not None else \"- **p90:** N/A\")\r\n    lines.append(f\"- **p99:** {lp.p99_ms:.2f} ms\" if lp.p99_ms is not None else \"- **p99:** N/A\")\r\n    lines.append(\"\")\r\n\r\n    # Top talkers\r\n    lines.append(\"## Top Talkers\")\r\n    lines.append(\"\")\r\n    lines.append(\"| IP | Bytes Sent | Bytes Recv |\")\r\n    lines.append(\"|----|------------|------------|\")\r\n    for t in summary.top_talkers:\r\n        lines.append(f\"| {t.ip} | {t.bytes_sent} | {t.bytes_recv} |\")\r\n    lines.append(\"\")\r\n\r\n    # Top destinations\r\n    lines.append(\"## Top Destinations\")\r\n    lines.append(\"\")\r\n    lines.append(\"| Target | Bytes Sent | Flow Count |\")\r\n    lines.append(\"|--------|------------|------------|\")\r\n    for d in summary.top_destinations:\r\n        lines.append(f\"| {d.target} | {d.bytes_sent} | {d.flow_count} |\")\r\n    lines.append(\"\")\r\n\r\n    # Behavior profile\r\n    lines.append(\"## Behavior Profile\")\r\n    lines.append(\"\")\r\n    if summary.active_flow_peaks > 1:\r\n        lines.append(\r\n            f\"- **Burstiness:** Peak concurrency of {summary.active_flow_peaks} simultaneous flows.\"\r\n        )\r\n    if summary.top_talkers:\r\n        top = summary.top_talkers[0]\r\n        total = top.bytes_sent + top.bytes_recv\r\n        if summary.total_bytes > 0:\r\n            pct = 100.0 * total / summary.total_bytes\r\n            lines.append(\r\n                f\"- **Heavy endpoint:** Top talker {top.ip} accounts for {pct:.1f}% of traffic.\"\r\n            )\r\n    if lp.p99_ms is not None and lp.p50_ms is not None and lp.p50_ms > 0:\r\n        ratio = lp.p99_ms / lp.p50_ms\r\n        if ratio > 2:\r\n            lines.append(\r\n                f\"- **Long-tail latency:** p99/p50 ratio is {ratio:.1f}x; some requests have high latency.\"\r\n            )\r\n    lines.append(\"\")\r\n    return \"\\n\".join(lines)\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "834b04843f4596ab5400f0dbbc5e307fe216faa335994a99021332f95eeb1a3c",

    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"netprof summarize subcommand.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nimport json\r\nfrom pathlib import Path\r\n\r\nimport typer\r\n\r\nfrom netprof.models.flow import Flow\r\nfrom netprof.models.transaction import Transaction\r\nfrom netprof.report.summary_builder import build_summary\r\n\r\n\r\ndef summarize_cmd(\r\n    output_dir: Path = typer.Argument(\r\n        ..., help=\"Output directory containing flows.jsonl and transactions.jsonl\"\r\n    ),\r\n) -> None:\r\n    \"\"\"Recompute and print key metrics from flows.jsonl and transactions.jsonl.\"\"\"\r\n    out = Path(output_dir)\r\n    flows_path = out / \"flows.jsonl\"\r\n    txns_path = out / \"transactions.jsonl\"\r\n    if not flows_path.exists():\r\n        typer.echo(f\"Not found: {flows_path}\", err=True)\r\n        raise typer.Exit(1)\r\n    flows = []\r\n    with open(flows_path, encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\r\n        for line in f:\r\n            line = line.strip()\r\n            if not line:\r\n                continue\r\n            flows.append(Flow.model_validate(json.loads(line)))\r\n    transactions = []\r\n    if txns_path.exists():\r\n        with open(txns_path, encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\r\n            for line in f:\r\n                line = line.strip()\r\n                if not line:\r\n                    continue\r\n                transactions.append(Transaction.model_validate(json.loads(line)))\r\n    summary = build_summary(flows, transactions)\r\n    # Overwrite summary.json\r\n    with open(out / \"summary.json\", \"w\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\r\n        f.write(json.dumps(summary.model_dump(), indent=2))\r\n    # Print key metrics\r\n    typer.echo(f\"Total flows: {summary.total_flows}\")\r\n    typer.echo(f\"Total bytes: {summary.total_bytes}\")\r\n    typer.echo(f\"Total transactions: {summary.total_transactions}\")\r\n    typer.echo(f\"Active flow peaks: {summary.active_flow_peaks}\")\r\n    lp = summary.latency_percentiles\r\n    if lp.p50_ms is not None:\r\n        typer.echo(f\"Latency p50: {lp.p50_ms:.2f} ms\")\r\n    if lp.p90_ms is not None:\r\n        typer.echo(f\"Latency p90: {lp.p90_ms:.2f} ms\")\r\n    if lp.p99_ms is not None:\r\n        typer.echo(f\"Latency p99: {lp.p99_ms:.2f} ms\")\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "4de36000579860ab77109a42d6e52d668c0de201dc9cb48b98bc7f93b85319a8",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },

          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Generate deterministic synthetic PCAP fixtures using scapy and h2.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom pathlib import Path\r\n\r\n# Deterministic IPs/ports for fixtures\r\nFIXTURE_CLIENT_IP = \"192.168.1.100\"\r\nFIXTURE_SERVER_IP = \"192.168.1.1\"\r\nFIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT = 45000\r\nFIXTURE_SERVER_PORT = 80\r\nINITIAL_CLIENT_ISN = 1000\r\nINITIAL_SERVER_ISN = 2000\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _get_scapy():\r\n    try:\r\n        from scapy.all import IP, TCP, Ether, Raw, wrpcap\r\n\r\n        return Ether, IP, TCP, Raw, wrpcap\r\n    except ImportError:\r\n        raise ImportError(\"scapy is required for fixture generation (pip install scapy)\")\r\n\r\n\r\ndef generate_http1_pcap(path: Path) -> None:\r\n    \"\"\"Create http1_keepalive.pcap: one TCP flow with 2 HTTP/1.1 requests (keep-alive).\"\"\"\r\n    Ether, IP, TCP, Raw, wrpcap = _get_scapy()\r\n    packets = []\r\n    ts = 1000000.0\r\n    client_isn = INITIAL_CLIENT_ISN\r\n    server_isn = INITIAL_SERVER_ISN\r\n    # SYN\r\n    p = (\r\n        Ether()\r\n        / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP)\r\n        / TCP(sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, flags=\"S\", seq=client_isn)\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    client_isn += 1\r\n    # SYN-ACK\r\n    p = (\r\n        Ether()\r\n        / IP(src=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP, dst=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP)\r\n        / TCP(\r\n            sport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT,\r\n            dport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT,\r\n            flags=\"SA\",\r\n            seq=server_isn,\r\n            ack=client_isn,\r\n        )\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    server_isn += 1\r\n    # ACK\r\n    p = (\r\n        Ether()\r\n        / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP)\r\n        / TCP(\r\n            sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT,\r\n            dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT,\r\n            flags=\"A\",\r\n            seq=client_isn,\r\n            ack=server_isn,\r\n        )\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    # Request 1\r\n    req1 = b\"GET /first HTTP/1.1\\r\\nHost: example.com\\r\\nConnection: keep-alive\\r\\n\\r\\n\"\r\n    p = (\r\n        Ether()\r\n        / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP)\r\n        / TCP(\r\n            sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT,\r\n            dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT,\r\n            flags=\"PA\",\r\n            seq=client_isn,\r\n            ack=server_isn,\r\n        )\r\n        / Raw(req1)\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    client_isn += len(req1)\r\n    ts += 0.02\r\n    # Response 1\r\n    resp1 = b\"HTTP/1.1 200 OK\\r\\nContent-Length: 5\\r\\nConnection: keep-alive\\r\\n\\r\\nhello\"\r\n    p = (\r\n        Ether()\r\n        / IP(src=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP, dst=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP)\r\n        / TCP(\r\n            sport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT,\r\n            dport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT,\r\n            flags=\"PA\",\r\n            seq=server_isn,\r\n            ack=client_isn,\r\n        )\r\n        / Raw(resp1)\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    server_isn += len(resp1)\r\n    ts += 0.02\r\n    # Request 2\r\n    req2 = b\"GET /second HTTP/1.1\\r\\nHost: example.com\\r\\nConnection: keep-alive\\r\\n\\r\\n\"\r\n    p = (\r\n        Ether()\r\n        / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP)\r\n        / TCP(\r\n            sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT,\r\n            dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT,\r\n            flags=\"PA\",\r\n            seq=client_isn,\r\n            ack=server_isn,\r\n        )\r\n        / Raw(req2)\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    client_isn += len(req2)\r\n    ts += 0.02\r\n    # Response 2\r\n    resp2 = b\"HTTP/1.1 200 OK\\r\\nContent-Length: 5\\r\\n\\r\\nworld\"\r\n    p = (\r\n        Ether()\r\n        / IP(src=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP, dst=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP)\r\n        / TCP(\r\n            sport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT,\r\n            dport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT,\r\n            flags=\"PA\",\r\n            seq=server_isn,\r\n            ack=client_isn,\r\n        )\r\n        / Raw(resp2)\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    server_isn += len(resp2)\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    # FIN from server\r\n    p = (\r\n        Ether()\r\n        / IP(src=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP, dst=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP)\r\n        / TCP(\r\n            sport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT,\r\n            dport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT,\r\n            flags=\"FA\",\r\n            seq=server_isn,\r\n            ack=client_isn,\r\n        )\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    server_isn += 1\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    # FIN-ACK from client\r\n    p = (\r\n        Ether()\r\n        / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP)\r\n        / TCP(\r\n            sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT,\r\n            dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT,\r\n            flags=\"FA\",\r\n            seq=client_isn,\r\n            ack=server_isn,\r\n        )\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    client_isn += 1\r\n    wrpcap(str(path), packets)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef generate_http2_pcap(path: Path) -> None:\r\n    \"\"\"Create http2_minimal.pcap: one TCP flow with HTTP/2 client preface and minimal SETTINGS + HEADERS + DATA.\"\"\"\r\n    Ether, IP, TCP, Raw, wrpcap = _get_scapy()\r\n    # Build HTTP/2 bytes: preface + SETTINGS (empty) + HEADERS (minimal request) + DATA\r\n    preface = b\"PRI * HTTP/2.0\\r\\n\\r\\nSM\\r\\n\\r\\n\"\r\n    try:\r\n        import h2.config\r\n        import h2.connection\r\n\r\n        config = h2.config.H2Configuration(client_side=True)\r\n        conn = h2.connection.H2Connection(config=config)\r\n        conn.initiate_connection()\r\n        data_to_send = conn.data_to_send()\r\n        # Request: GET / HTTP/2\r\n        stream_id = conn.get_next_available_stream_id()\r\n        conn.send_headers(\r\n            stream_id,\r\n            [\r\n                (\":method\", \"GET\"),\r\n                (\":path\", \"/\"),\r\n                (\":scheme\", \"https\"),\r\n                (\":authority\", \"example.com\"),\r\n            ],\r\n            end_stream=True,\r\n        )\r\n        data_to_send += conn.data_to_send()\r\n        client_bytes = preface + data_to_send\r\n    except Exception:\r\n        # Fallback: minimal manual framing (SETTINGS frame type=4, length=0, stream_id=0)\r\n        # 9-byte header: 3 bytes length (0), 1 type (4), 1 flags (0), 4 stream_id (0)\r\n        settings_frame = bytes([0, 0, 0, 4, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0])\r\n        # HEADERS frame for stream 1: type=1, need to HPACK-encode :method GET, :path /\r\n        import hpack\r\n\r\n        encoder = hpack.Encoder()\r\n        encoded = encoder.encode(\r\n            [\r\n                (\":method\", \"GET\"),\r\n                (\":path\", \"/\"),\r\n                (\":scheme\", \"https\"),\r\n                (\":authority\", \"example.com\"),\r\n            ]\r\n        )\r\n        # Frame: length=len(encoded), type=1, flags=5 (END_HEADERS|END_STREAM), stream_id=1\r\n        length = len(encoded)\r\n        headers_frame = (\r\n            bytes([(length >> 16) & 0xFF, (length >> 8) & 0xFF, length & 0xFF, 1, 5, 0, 0, 0, 1])\r\n            + encoded\r\n        )\r\n        client_bytes = preface + settings_frame + headers_frame\r\n    # Server: SETTINGS ack, HEADERS response :status 200, DATA \"ok\"\r\n    try:\r\n        import h2.config\r\n        import h2.connection\r\n\r\n        config = h2.config.H2Configuration(client_side=False)\r\n        sconn = h2.connection.H2Connection(config=config)\r\n        sconn.initiate_connection()\r\n        server_bytes = sconn.data_to_send()\r\n        # Receive client data (preface + frames) to update state\r\n        sconn.receive_data(client_bytes[len(preface) :])\r\n        # Send response\r\n        sconn.send_headers(1, [(\":status\", \"200\")], end_headers=True)\r\n        sconn.send_data(1, b\"ok\", end_stream=True)\r\n        server_bytes = sconn.data_to_send()\r\n    except Exception:\r\n        import hpack\r\n\r\n        encoder = hpack.Encoder()\r\n        encoded = encoder.encode([(\":status\", \"200\")])\r\n        length = len(encoded)\r\n        headers_frame = (\r\n            bytes([(length >> 16) & 0xFF, (length >> 8) & 0xFF, length & 0xFF, 1, 4, 0, 0, 0, 1])\r\n            + encoded\r\n        )\r\n        data_frame = (\r\n            bytes([0, 0, 2, 0, 1, 0, 0, 0, 1]) + b\"ok\"\r\n        )  # length=2, type=0, flags=1 (END_STREAM)\r\n        server_bytes = headers_frame + data_frame\r\n    # Build TCP session with scapy\r\n    packets = []\r\n    ts = 1000000.0\r\n    client_isn = INITIAL_CLIENT_ISN\r\n    server_isn = INITIAL_SERVER_ISN\r\n    # SYN\r\n    p = (\r\n        Ether()\r\n        / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP)\r\n        / TCP(sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, flags=\"S\", seq=client_isn)\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    client_isn += 1\r\n    # SYN-ACK\r\n    p = (\r\n        Ether()\r\n        / IP(src=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP, dst=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP)\r\n        / TCP(\r\n            sport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT,\r\n            dport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT,\r\n            flags=\"SA\",\r\n            seq=server_isn,\r\n            ack=client_isn,\r\n        )\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    server_isn += 1\r\n    # ACK + client bytes (preface + frames)\r\n    p = (\r\n        Ether()\r\n        / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP)\r\n        / TCP(\r\n            sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT,\r\n            dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT,\r\n            flags=\"PA\",\r\n            seq=client_isn,\r\n            ack=server_isn,\r\n        )\r\n        / Raw(client_bytes)\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    client_isn += len(client_bytes)\r\n    ts += 0.02\r\n    # ACK from server (optional) + server bytes\r\n    p = (\r\n        Ether()\r\n        / IP(src=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP, dst=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP)\r\n        / TCP(\r\n            sport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT,\r\n            dport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT,\r\n            flags=\"PA\",\r\n            seq=server_isn,\r\n            ack=client_isn,\r\n        )\r\n        / Raw(server_bytes)\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    server_isn += len(server_bytes)\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    # FIN server\r\n    p = (\r\n        Ether()\r\n        / IP(src=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP, dst=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP)\r\n        / TCP(\r\n            sport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT,\r\n            dport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT,\r\n            flags=\"FA\",\r\n            seq=server_isn,\r\n            ack=client_isn,\r\n        )\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    server_isn += 1\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    # FIN-ACK client\r\n    p = (\r\n        Ether()\r\n        / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP)\r\n        / TCP(\r\n            sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT,\r\n            dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT,\r\n            flags=\"FA\",\r\n            seq=client_isn,\r\n            ack=server_isn,\r\n        )\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    wrpcap(str(path), packets)\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "2e71f048cbfb48ad38154f7a3ed8b467220bdafdeaa9387a58ed191348e8064d",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },

        {

        },

          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },

          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"netprof analyze subcommand.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nimport json\r\nfrom pathlib import Path\r\n\r\nimport typer\r\n\r\nfrom netprof.config import load_config\r\nfrom netprof.models.flow import Flow\r\nfrom netprof.models.transaction import Transaction\r\nfrom netprof.parsers.flow_tracker import FlowTracker\r\nfrom netprof.parsers.pcap_reader import discover_capture_files, read_pcap\r\nfrom netprof.parsers.tcp_reassembly import TCPReassembler\r\nfrom netprof.protocols.grpc import GrpcHandler\r\nfrom netprof.protocols.http1 import HTTP1Handler\r\nfrom netprof.protocols.http2 import HTTP2Handler\r\nfrom netprof.report.errors import ErrorLogger\r\nfrom netprof.report.profile_md import build_profile_md\r\nfrom netprof.report.summary_builder import build_summary\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _capture_file_id(path: Path, index: int) -> str:\r\n    \"\"\"Stable id for correlation (basename or index).\"\"\"\r\n    return path.name or str(index)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _run_protocols(\r\n    c2s_bytes: bytes,\r\n    s2c_bytes: bytes,\r\n    flow_id: str,\r\n    c2s_ts_map: list[tuple[int, float]],\r\n    s2c_ts_map: list[tuple[int, float]],\r\n    errors: ErrorLogger,\r\n) -> list[Transaction]:\r\n    \"\"\"Run protocol handlers in order: HTTP/2 (+ gRPC) or HTTP/1.1. Return merged transactions.\"\"\"\r\n    http2_handler = HTTP2Handler()\r\n    grpc_handler = GrpcHandler()\r\n    http1_handler = HTTP1Handler()\r\n    if http2_handler.detect(c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes):\r\n        http2_txns = http2_handler.parse(c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, flow_id, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map)\r\n        grpc_txns = grpc_handler.parse(c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, flow_id, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map)\r\n        grpc_streams = {(t.flow_id, t.stream_id) for t in grpc_txns if t.stream_id is not None}\r\n        out = []\r\n        for t in http2_txns:\r\n            if (t.flow_id, t.stream_id) in grpc_streams:\r\n                continue\r\n            out.append(t)\r\n        out.extend(grpc_txns)\r\n        return out\r\n    if http1_handler.detect(c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes):\r\n        return http1_handler.parse(c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, flow_id, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map)\r\n    return []\r\n\r\n\r\ndef analyze_cmd(\r\n    pcap_path: Path = typer.Argument(..., help=\"Path to PCAP/PCAPNG file or directory\"),\r\n    out: Path = typer.Option(..., \"--out\", help=\"Output directory\"),\r\n    config: Path | None = typer.Option(None, \"--config\", help=\"Optional YAML config path\"),\r\n) -> None:\r\n    \"\"\"Analyze PCAP/PCAPNG and write summary, flows, transactions, profile.md, errors.log.\"\"\"\r\n    settings = load_config(config)\r\n    out_path = Path(out)\r\n    out_path.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\r\n    errors = ErrorLogger(out_path)\r\n    try:\r\n        files = discover_capture_files(Path(pcap_path))\r\n        if not files:\r\n            typer.echo(f\"No capture files found at {pcap_path}\", err=True)\r\n            raise typer.Exit(1)\r\n        reassembler = TCPReassembler(\r\n            max_bytes_per_direction=settings.reassembly_buffer_per_flow_bytes\r\n        )\r\n        all_flows: list[Flow] = []\r\n        all_transactions: list[Transaction] = []\r\n        for file_index, path in enumerate(files):\r\n            capture_file_id = _capture_file_id(path, file_index)\r\n            tracker = FlowTracker(\r\n                capture_file_id=capture_file_id,\r\n                flow_idle_timeout_sec=settings.flow_idle_timeout_sec,\r\n                concurrency_bucket_seconds=settings.concurrency_bucket_seconds,\r\n            )\r\n            try:\r\n                for (\r\n                    ts,\r\n                    src_ip,\r\n                    dst_ip,\r\n                    src_port,\r\n                    dst_port,\r\n                    protocol,\r\n                    payload,\r\n                    tcp_seq,\r\n                    tcp_flags,\r\n                ) in read_pcap(path):\r\n                    for flow, segments in tracker.ingest(\r\n                        ts,\r\n                        src_ip,\r\n                        src_port,\r\n                        dst_ip,\r\n                        dst_port,\r\n                        protocol,\r\n                        payload,\r\n                        tcp_seq,\r\n                        tcp_flags,\r\n                    ):\r\n                        c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map, truncated = (\r\n                            reassembler.reassemble(segments)\r\n                        )\r\n                        if truncated:\r\n                            errors.log(\r\n                                \"Reassembly truncated\", flow_id=flow.flow_id, detail=\"buffer limit\"\r\n                            )\r\n                        all_flows.append(flow)\r\n                        txns = _run_protocols(\r\n                            c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, flow.flow_id, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map, errors\r\n                        )\r\n                        all_transactions.extend(txns)\r\n            except Exception as e:\r\n                errors.log(f\"Error processing {path}: {e}\")\r\n            for flow, segments in tracker.flush_idle():\r\n                c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map, truncated = reassembler.reassemble(\r\n                    segments\r\n                )\r\n                if truncated:\r\n                    errors.log(\"Reassembly truncated\", flow_id=flow.flow_id, detail=\"buffer limit\")\r\n                all_flows.append(flow)\r\n                txns = _run_protocols(\r\n                    c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, flow.flow_id, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map, errors\r\n                )\r\n                all_transactions.extend(txns)\r\n        # Write flows.jsonl\r\n        with open(out_path / \"flows.jsonl\", \"w\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\r\n            for flow in all_flows:\r\n                f.write(flow.to_jsonl_line() + \"\\n\")\r\n        # Write transactions.jsonl\r\n        with open(out_path / \"transactions.jsonl\", \"w\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\r\n            for t in all_transactions:\r\n                f.write(t.to_jsonl_line() + \"\\n\")\r\n        # Summary and profile\r\n        summary = build_summary(\r\n            all_flows,\r\n            all_transactions,\r\n            top_talkers_n=settings.top_talkers_n,\r\n            top_destinations_n=settings.top_destinations_n,\r\n            top_ports_n=settings.top_ports_n,\r\n        )\r\n        with open(out_path / \"summary.json\", \"w\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\r\n            f.write(json.dumps(summary.model_dump(), indent=2))\r\n        profile_md = build_profile_md(summary, all_transactions)\r\n        with open(out_path / \"profile.md\", \"w\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\r\n            f.write(profile_md)\r\n        typer.echo(\r\n            f\"Wrote {out_path}: {len(all_flows)} flows, {len(all_transactions)} transactions.\"\r\n        )\r\n    finally:\r\n        errors.close()\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "e94c0bc55b725e22b878f966af7cd3745748cda59c45345adfd1dcf2a077df5c",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "# Netprof configuration example.\r\n# Use with: netprof analyze <pcap> --out <dir> --config config.yaml\r\n\r\n# Max bytes per flow per direction for TCP reassembly (default: 1MiB)\r\nreassembly_buffer_per_flow_bytes: 1048576\r\n\r\n# Max active flows before eviction (default: 50000)\r\nmax_active_flows: 50000\r\n\r\n# Consider flow closed after this many seconds without packets (default: 60)\r\nflow_idle_timeout_sec: 60.0\r\n\r\n# Time bucket size in seconds for concurrency timeline (default: 1.0)\r\nconcurrency_bucket_seconds: 1.0\r\n\r\n# Top-N sizes for summary\r\ntop_talkers_n: 10\r\ntop_destinations_n: 10\r\ntop_ports_n: 10\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "148f612183042f8015a3ead84cb7225763b3f893a7a57908d84a4b68a0be07de",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": "."
      },
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "# Netprof Makefile (use with make or nmake /f Makefile on Windows with GNU make)\r\n\r\n.PHONY: test lint analyze-fixtures install\r\n\r\ninstall:\r\n\tpip install -e .\r\n\r\ntest:\r\n\tpytest tests/ -v\r\n\r\nlint:\r\n\truff check netprof tests\r\n\t-mypy netprof --ignore-missing-imports\r\n\r\nanalyze-fixtures: install\r\n\tnetprof fixtures generate -o fixtures\r\n\tnetprof analyze fixtures --out out_fixtures\r\n\tnetprof summarize out_fixtures\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "1e8603184ff05724a77a7e94b9a4ce1a3aba705aadf42fa5d105fe3edae24c2d",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": "."
      },
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "# Netprof: Offline Network Traffic Collector and Behavior Profiler\r\n\r\nNetprof ingests PCAP/PCAPNG files, reconstructs TCP flows, extracts application-layer transactions (HTTP/1.1, HTTP/2, gRPC) when plaintext, and produces machine-readable artifacts plus a human-readable report.\r\n\r\n## Quickstart\r\n\r\n```bash\r\npip install -e .\r\nnetprof analyze sample.pcap --out out\r\nnetprof summarize out\r\nnetprof fixtures generate -o fixtures   # create synthetic test fixtures\r\n```\r\n\r\n## CLI\r\n\r\n- **`netprof analyze <pcap_path> --out <output_dir> [--config config.yaml]`**  \r\n  Analyzes a file or directory of `.pcap`/`.pcapng` files. Writes:\r\n  - `out/summary.json` – top talkers, destinations, ports, flow peaks, latency percentiles\r\n  - `out/flows.jsonl` – one JSON object per flow\r\n  - `out/transactions.jsonl` – one JSON per HTTP/gRPC transaction\r\n  - `out/profile.md` – human-readable report\r\n  - `out/errors.log` – parse errors and skipped parsing reasons\r\n\r\n- **`netprof summarize <output_dir>`**  \r\n  Recomputes summary from `flows.jsonl` and `transactions.jsonl` and prints key metrics (and overwrites `summary.json`).\r\n\r\n- **`netprof fixtures generate [--output dir]**  \r\n  Creates deterministic synthetic PCAP fixtures under `fixtures/` (or the given directory) for tests.\r\n\r\n## What Can and Cannot Be Parsed (TLS)\r\n\r\n- **Encrypted (TLS) traffic:** Application-layer payload cannot be decrypted. Netprof still produces **flow-level profiling**: timing, byte counts per direction, packet counts, estimated RTT, and concurrency over time.\r\n- **Plaintext traffic:** HTTP/1.1, HTTP/2, and gRPC (over HTTP/2) are parsed when the payload is in the clear. Transactions, latency, and endpoints are extracted.\r\n\r\n## Correlation IDs\r\n\r\n- **`flow_id`:** Stable hash of the canonical 5-tuple plus capture file id. The 5-tuple is normalized so the same flow from either direction yields the same id: endpoints are ordered (e.g. `ip:port` lexicographically), then `SHA256(ep1|ep2|protocol|capture_file_id)` is truncated to 16 hex chars.\r\n- **`txn_id`:**  \r\n  - HTTP/1.1: `flow_id + \"_\" + transaction_index` (sequential per connection).  \r\n  - HTTP/2 / gRPC: `flow_id + \"_s\" + stream_id`.\r\n\r\n## Performance and Memory\r\n\r\n- **Streaming:** PCAP is read via an iterator; the file is not loaded entirely into memory.\r\n- **Bounded memory:**  \r\n  - Per-flow TCP reassembly is limited to `reassembly_buffer_per_flow_bytes` per direction (default 1 MiB).  \r\n  - The number of active flows is capped by `max_active_flows` (default 50,000); excess flows are evicted and noted in `errors.log`.\r\n- For large directories, processing is file-by-file; use a reasonable `flow_idle_timeout_sec` so idle flows are closed and memory is released.\r\n\r\n## Extending with New Protocols\r\n\r\n1. Add a module under `netprof/protocols/` (e.g. `myproto.py`).\r\n2. Implement the same interface as existing handlers:\r\n   - `name` (property): protocol name\r\n   - `detect(c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes) -> bool`\r\n   - `parse(c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, flow_id, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map) -> list[Transaction]`\r\n3. Register the handler in the analyze pipeline (e.g. in `cli/analyze.py`) and run it in the desired order (e.g. after HTTP/2, before HTTP/1.1).\r\n4. Document the new protocol and any config in this README.\r\n\r\n## Assumptions\r\n\r\n- **Flow timeout:** A flow is considered closed after `flow_idle_timeout_sec` (default 60s) with no packets.\r\n- **Capture file id:** For directory input, the basename (or index) of each file is used in `flow_id` to avoid collisions across files.\r\n- **PCAPNG:** dpkt’s `UniversalReader` is used when available; if PCAPNG fails on your platform, only `.pcap` is supported (see README or `errors.log`).\r\n- **Latency:** For HTTP, latency is time to first response byte minus time of first request byte (TTFB-style).\r\n- **Top ports:** Reported as destination ports and flow counts unless configured otherwise.\r\n\r\n## Development\r\n\r\n```bash\r\npip install -e \".[dev]\"\r\nmake test    # pytest\r\nmake lint    # ruff + mypy (mypy may be partial)\r\nmake analyze-fixtures\r\n```\r\n\r\n## License\r\n\r\nMIT.\r\n"

by 5-tuple.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nimport json\r\n\r\nfrom pydantic import BaseModel, Field\r\n\r\n\r\nclass Flow(BaseModel):\r\n    \"\"\"A single TCP flow with timing, byte counts, and optional RTT/concurrency.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    flow_id: str\r\n    capture_file_id: str\r\n    src_ip: str\r\n    src_port: int\r\n    dst_ip: str\r\n    dst_port: int\r\n    protocol: int = 6  # TCP\r\n    # Initiator = side that sent first SYN (client)\r\n    client_ip: str = Field(description=\"IP of the initiator (client)\")\r\n    client_port: int = Field(description=\"Port of the initiator\")\r\n    server_ip: str = Field(description=\"IP of the responder (server)\")\r\n    server_port: int = Field(description=\"Port of the responder\")\r\n    start_ts: float = Field(description=\"First packet timestamp (Unix)\")\r\n    end_ts: float = Field(description=\"Last packet timestamp (Unix)\")\r\n    duration_sec: float = Field(description=\"end_ts - start_ts\")\r\n    bytes_client_to_server: int = 0\r\n    bytes_server_to_client: int = 0\r\n    packet_count_c2s: int = 0\r\n    packet_count_s2c: int = 0\r\n    estimated_rtt_ms: float | None = None\r\n    concurrency_timeline: list[tuple[float, int]] | None = Field(\r\n        default=None,\r\n        description=\"(bucket_start_ts, active_flow_count) per bucket\",\r\n    )\r\n\r\n    def to_jsonl_line(self) -> str:\r\n        \"\"\"One-line JSON for JSONL output.\"\"\"\r\n        return json.dumps(self.model_dump(mode=\"json\"))\r\n"}, "2:LEN": "ebc617a1058df5ff394838ff8fde345a74b9b47fb8e3193356ec5de33bac3bd6", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}, {"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Transaction model: one HTTP/gRPC request-response or stream.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nimport json\r\n\r\nfrom pydantic import BaseModel, Field\r\n\r\n\r\nclass Transaction(BaseModel):\r\n    \"\"\"One application-layer transaction (HTTP/1.1, HTTP/2 stream, or gRPC call).\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    txn_id: str\r\n    flow_id: str\r\n    protocol: str = Field(description=\"http1 | http2 | grpc\")\r\n    method: str | None = None\r\n    authority: str | None = None  # Host for HTTP/1.1, :authority for HTTP/2\r\n    path: str | None = None\r\n    status_code: int | None = None\r\n    stream_id: int | None = None\r\n    request_ts: float | None = None\r\n    response_ts: float | None = None\r\n    end_ts: float | None = None\r\n    latency_ms: float | None = Field(default=None, description=\"response_ts - request_ts in ms\")\r\n    request_bytes: int = 0\r\n    response_bytes: int = 0\r\n    grpc_service: str | None = None\r\n    grpc_method: str | None = None\r\n    message_sizes: list[int] | None = None  # gRPC message lengths from framing\r\n\r\n    def to_jsonl_line(self) -> str:\r\n        \"\"\"One-line JSON for JSONL output.\"\"\"\r\n        return json.dumps(self.model_dump(mode=\"json\"))\r\n"}, "2:LEN": "6a465b8d16f4d89990bf475760936c5c8ac15495fcf7e3f056eb192ffab59df9", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}, {"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Build summary.json from flows and transactions.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom collections import defaultdict\r\n\r\nfrom netprof.models.flow import Flow\r\nfrom netprof.models.summary import (\r\n    LatencyPercentiles,\r\n    Summary,\r\n    TopDestination,\r\n    TopTalker,\r\n)\r\nfrom netprof.models.transaction import Transaction\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _percentile(sorted_values: list[float], p: float) -> float | None:\r\n    if not sorted_values:\r\n        return None\r\n    k = (len(sorted_values) - 1) * p / 100.0\r\n    f = int(k)\r\n    c = f + 1 if f + 1 < len(sorted_values) else f\r\n    return (\r\n        sorted_values[f] + (k - f) * (sorted_values[c] - sorted_values[f])\r\n        if c > f\r\n        else sorted_values[f]\r\n    )\r\n\r\n\r\ndef build_summary(\r\n    flows: list[Flow],\r\n    transactions: list[Transaction],\r\n    top_talkers_n: int = 10,\r\n    top_destinations_n: int = 10,\r\n    top_ports_n: int = 10,\r\n) -> Summary:\r\n    \"\"\"Compute aggregate stats from flows and transactions.\"\"\"\r\n    total_flows = len(flows)\r\n    total_bytes = sum(f.bytes_client_to_server + f.bytes_server_to_client for f in flows)\r\n    total_transactions = len(transactions)\r\n\r\n    # Top talkers: by IP, aggregate bytes sent/recv (as client or server)\r\n    ip_bytes_sent: dict[str, int] = defaultdict(int)\r\n    ip_bytes_recv: dict[str, int] = defaultdict(int)\r\n    for f in flows:\r\n        ip_bytes_sent[f.client_ip] += f.bytes_client_to_server\r\n        ip_bytes_recv[f.client_ip] += f.bytes_server_to_client\r\n        ip_bytes_sent[f.server_ip] += f.bytes_server_to_client\r\n        ip_bytes_recv[f.server_ip] += f.bytes_client_to_server\r\n    talkers = [\r\n        TopTalker(ip=ip, bytes_sent=ip_bytes_sent[ip], bytes_recv=ip_bytes_recv[ip])\r\n        for ip in sorted(set(ip_bytes_sent) | set(ip_bytes_recv))\r\n    ]\r\n    talkers.sort(key=lambda t: t.bytes_sent + t.bytes_recv, reverse=True)\r\n    top_talkers = talkers[:top_talkers_n]\r\n\r\n    # Top destinations: server endpoint (server_ip:port), bytes_sent to it, flow_count\r\n    dest_bytes: dict[str, int] = defaultdict(int)\r\n    dest_flows: dict[str, int] = defaultdict(int)\r\n    for f in flows:\r\n        key = f\"{f.server_ip}:{f.server_port}\"\r\n        dest_bytes[key] += f.bytes_client_to_server\r\n        dest_flows[key] += 1\r\n    dests = [\r\n        TopDestination(target=k, bytes_sent=dest_bytes[k], flow_count=dest_flows[k])\r\n        for k in sorted(dest_bytes.keys())\r\n    ]\r\n    dests.sort(key=lambda d: d.bytes_sent, reverse=True)\r\n    top_destinations = dests[:top_destinations_n]\r\n\r\n    # Top ports: destination port, count of flows\r\n    port_count: dict[int, int] = defaultdict(int)\r\n    for f in flows:\r\n        port_count[f.server_port] += 1\r\n    top_ports = [\r\n        {\"port\": p, \"count\": port_count[p]}\r\n        for p in sorted(port_count.keys(), key=lambda p: -port_count[p])[:top_ports_n]\r\n    ]\r\n\r\n    # Active flow peaks: max concurrent in any bucket\r\n    active_flow_peaks = 0\r\n    for f in flows:\r\n        if f.concurrency_timeline:\r\n            for _ts, count in f.concurrency_timeline:\r\n                if count > active_flow_peaks:\r\n                    active_flow_peaks = count\r\n\r\n    # Latency percentiles from transactions with latency_ms\r\n    latencies = [t.latency_ms for t in transactions if t.latency_ms is not None]\r\n    latencies.sort()\r\n    p50 = _percentile(latencies, 50)\r\n    p90 = _percentile(latencies, 90)\r\n    p99 = _percentile(latencies, 99)\r\n    latency_percentiles = LatencyPercentiles(p50_ms=p50, p90_ms=p90, p99_ms=p99)\r\n\r\n    return Summary(\r\n        total_flows=total_flows,\r\n        total_bytes=total_bytes,\r\n        total_transactions=total_transactions,\r\n        top_talkers=top_talkers,\r\n        top_destinations=top_destinations,\r\n        top_ports=top_ports,\r\n        active_flow_peaks=active_flow_peaks,\r\n        latency_percentiles=latency_percentiles,\r\n    )\r\n"}, "2:LEN": "8567127492c0404491fb5385ba82f1ecd33d1697afbe1eba52b4fa91ac78a88c", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}, {"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Generate human-readable profile.md report.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom netprof.models.summary import Summary\r\nfrom netprof.models.transaction import Transaction\r\n\r\n\r\ndef build_profile_md(summary: Summary, transactions: list[Transaction]) -> str:\r\n    \"\"\"Build markdown report with overview, tables, and behavior profile.\"\"\"\r\n    lines = [\"# Network Behavior Profile\", \"\"]\r\n\r\n    # Overview\r\n    lines.append(\"## Overview\")\r\n    lines.append(\"\")\r\n    lines.append(f\"- **Total flows:** {summary.total_flows}\")\r\n    lines.append(f\"- **Total bytes:** {summary.total_bytes}\")\r\n    lines.append(f\"- **Parsed transactions (HTTP/gRPC):** {summary.total_transactions}\")\r\n    lines.append(f\"- **Active flow peak (concurrent):** {summary.active_flow_peaks}\")\r\n    lines.append(\"\")\r\n\r\n    # Top endpoints (from transactions: path + method)\r\n    if transactions:\r\n        endpoint_counts: dict[str, int] = {}\r\n        for t in transactions:\r\n            key = f\"{t.method or '?'} {t.path or '?'}\"\r\n            endpoint_counts[key] = endpoint_counts.get(key, 0) + 1\r\n        sorted_endpoints = sorted(endpoint_counts.items(), key=lambda x: -x[1])[:15]\r\n        lines.append(\"## Top Endpoints\")\r\n        lines.append(\"\")\r\n        lines.append(\"| Method | Path | Count |\")\r\n        lines.append(\"|--------|------|-------|\")\r\n        for method_path, count in sorted_endpoints:\r\n            parts = method_path.split(\" \", 1)\r\n            method = parts[0]\r\n            path = parts[1] if len(parts) > 1 else \"\"\r\n            lines.append(f\"| {method} | {path} | {count} |\")\r\n        lines.append(\"\")\r\n\r\n        # Status codes\r\n        status_counts: dict[int, int] = {}\r\n        for t in transactions:\r\n            if t.status_code is not None:\r\n                status_counts[t.status_code] = status_counts.get(t.status_code, 0) + 1\r\n        if status_counts:\r\n            lines.append(\"## Status Codes\")\r\n            lines.append(\"\")\r\n            lines.append(\"| Code | Count |\")\r\n            lines.append(\"|------|-------|\")\r\n            for code, count in sorted(status_counts.items(), key=lambda x: -x[1]):\r\n                lines.append(f\"| {code} | {count} |\")\r\n            lines.append(\"\")\r\n\r\n    # Latency percentiles\r\n    lines.append(\"## Latency Percentiles (parsed HTTP/gRPC)\")\r\n    lines.append(\"\")\r\n    lp = summary.latency_percentiles\r\n    lines.append(f\"- **p50:** {lp.p50_ms:.2f} ms\" if lp.p50_ms is not None else \"- **p50:** N/A\")\r\n    lines.append(f\"- **p90:** {lp.p90_ms:.2f} ms\" if lp.p90_ms is not None else \"- **p90:** N/A\")\r\n    lines.append(f\"- **p99:** {lp.p99_ms:.2f} ms\" if lp.p99_ms is not None else \"- **p99:** N/A\")\r\n    lines.append(\"\")\r\n\r\n    # Top talkers\r\n    lines.append(\"## Top Talkers\")\r\n    lines.append(\"\")\r\n    lines.append(\"| IP | Bytes Sent | Bytes Recv |\")\r\n    lines.append(\"|----|------------|------------|\")\r\n    for t in summary.top_talkers:\r\n        lines.append(f\"| {t.ip} | {t.bytes_sent} | {t.bytes_recv} |\")\r\n    lines.append(\"\")\r\n\r\n    # Top destinations\r\n    lines.append(\"## Top Destinations\")\r\n    lines.append(\"\")\r\n    lines.append(\"| Target | Bytes Sent | Flow Count |\")\r\n    lines.append(\"|--------|------------|------------|\")\r\n    for d in summary.top_destinations:\r\n        lines.append(f\"| {d.target} | {d.bytes_sent} | {d.flow_count} |\")\r\n    lines.append(\"\")\r\n\r\n    # Behavior profile\r\n    lines.append(\"## Behavior Profile\")\r\n    lines.append(\"\")\r\n    if summary.active_flow_peaks > 1:\r\n        lines.append(\r\n            f\"- **Burstiness:** Peak concurrency of {summary.active_flow_peaks} simultaneous flows.\"\r\n        )\r\n    if summary.top_talkers:\r\n        top = summary.top_talkers[0]\r\n        total = top.bytes_sent + top.bytes_recv\r\n        if summary.total_bytes > 0:\r\n            pct = 100.0 * total / summary.total_bytes\r\n            lines.append(\r\n                f\"- **Heavy endpoint:** Top talker {top.ip} accounts for {pct:.1f}% of traffic.\"\r\n            )\r\n    if lp.p99_ms is not None and lp.p50_ms is not None and lp.p50_ms > 0:\r\n        ratio = lp.p99_ms / lp.p50_ms\r\n        if ratio > 2:\r\n            lines.append(\r\n                f\"- **Long-tail latency:** p99/p50 ratio is {ratio:.1f}x; some requests have high latency.\"\r\n            )\r\n    lines.append(\"\")\r\n    return \"\\n\".join(lines)\r\n"}, "2:LEN": "834b04843f4596ab5400f0dbbc5e307fe216faa335994a99021332f95eeb1a3c", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}, {"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "\"\"\"netprof summarize subcommand.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nimport json\r\nfrom pathlib import Path\r\n\r\nimport typer\r\n\r\nfrom netprof.models.flow import Flow\r\nfrom netprof.models.transaction import Transaction\r\nfrom netprof.report.summary_builder import build_summary\r\n\r\n\r\ndef summarize_cmd(\r\n    output_dir: Path = typer.Argument(\r\n        ..., help=\"Output directory containing flows.jsonl and transactions.jsonl\"\r\n    ),\r\n) -> None:\r\n    \"\"\"Recompute and print key metrics from flows.jsonl and transactions.jsonl.\"\"\"\r\n    out = Path(output_dir)\r\n    flows_path = out / \"flows.jsonl\"\r\n    txns_path = out / \"transactions.jsonl\"\r\n    if not flows_path.exists():\r\n        typer.echo(f\"Not found: {flows_path}\", err=True)\r\n        raise typer.Exit(1)\r\n    flows = []\r\n    with open(flows_path, encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\r\n        for line in f:\r\n            line = line.strip()\r\n            if not line:\r\n                continue\r\n            flows.append(Flow.model_validate(json.loads(line)))\r\n    transactions = []\r\n    if txns_path.exists():\r\n        with open(txns_path, encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\r\n            for line in f:\r\n                line = line.strip()\r\n                if not line:\r\n                    continue\r\n                transactions.append(Transaction.model_validate(json.loads(line)))\r\n    summary = build_summary(flows, transactions)\r\n    # Overwrite summary.json\r\n    with open(out / \"summary.json\", \"w\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\r\n        f.write(json.dumps(summary.model_dump(), indent=2))\r\n    # Print key metrics\r\n    typer.echo(f\"Total flows: {summary.total_flows}\")\r\n    typer.echo(f\"Total bytes: {summary.total_bytes}\")\r\n    typer.echo(f\"Total transactions: {summary.total_transactions}\")\r\n    typer.echo(f\"Active flow peaks: {summary.active_flow_peaks}\")\r\n    lp = summary.latency_percentiles\r\n    if lp.p50_ms is not None:\r\n        typer.echo(f\"Latency p50: {lp.p50_ms:.2f} ms\")\r\n    if lp.p90_ms is not None:\r\n        typer.echo(f\"Latency p90: {lp.p90_ms:.2f} ms\")\r\n    if lp.p99_ms is not None:\r\n        typer.echo(f\"Latency p99: {lp.p99_ms:.2f} ms\")\r\n"}, "2:LEN": "4de36000579860ab77109a42d6e52d668c0de201dc9cb48b98bc7f93b85319a8", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}, {"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Generate deterministic synthetic PCAP fixtures using scapy and h2.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom pathlib import Path\r\n\r\n# Deterministic IPs/ports for fixtures\r\nFIXTURE_CLIENT_IP = \"192.168.1.100\"\r\nFIXTURE_SERVER_IP = \"192.168.1.1\"\r\nFIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT = 45000\r\nFIXTURE_SERVER_PORT = 80\r\nINITIAL_CLIENT_ISN = 1000\r\nINITIAL_SERVER_ISN = 2000\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _get_scapy():\r\n    try:\r\n        from scapy.all import IP, TCP, Ether, Raw, wrpcap\r\n\r\n        return Ether, IP, TCP, Raw, wrpcap\r\n    except ImportError:\r\n        raise ImportError(\"scapy is required for fixture generation (pip install scapy)\")\r\n\r\n\r\ndef generate_http1_pcap(path: Path) -> None:\r\n    \"\"\"Create http1_keepalive.pcap: one TCP flow with 2 HTTP/1.1 requests (keep-alive).\"\"\"\r\n    Ether, IP, TCP, Raw, wrpcap = _get_scapy()\r\n    packets = []\r\n    ts = 1000000.0\r\n    client_isn = INITIAL_CLIENT_ISN\r\n    server_isn = INITIAL_SERVER_ISN\r\n    # SYN\r\n    p = (\r\n        Ether()\r\n        / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP)\r\n        / TCP(sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, flags=\"S\", seq=client_isn)\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    client_isn += 1\r\n    # SYN-ACK\r\n    p = (\r\n        Ether()\r\n        / IP(src=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP, dst=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP)\r\n        / TCP(\r\n            sport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT,\r\n            dport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT,\r\n            flags=\"SA\",\r\n            seq=server_isn,\r\n            ack=client_isn,\r\n        )\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    server_isn += 1\r\n    # ACK\r\n    p = (\r\n        Ether()\r\n        / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP)\r\n        / TCP(\r\n            sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT,\r\n            dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT,\r\n            flags=\"A\",\r\n            seq=client_isn,\r\n            ack=server_isn,\r\n        )\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    # Request 1\r\n    req1 = b\"GET /first HTTP/1.1\\r\\nHost: example.com\\r\\nConnection: keep-alive\\r\\n\\r\\n\"\r\n    p = (\r\n        Ether()\r\n        / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP)\r\n        / TCP(\r\n            sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT,\r\n            dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT,\r\n            flags=\"PA\",\r\n            seq=client_isn,\r\n            ack=server_isn,\r\n        )\r\n        / Raw(req1)\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    client_isn += len(req1)\r\n    ts += 0.02\r\n    # Response 1\r\n    resp1 = b\"HTTP/1.1 200 OK\\r\\nContent-Length: 5\\r\\nConnection: keep-alive\\r\\n\\r\\nhello\"\r\n    p = (\r\n        Ether()\r\n        / IP(src=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP, dst=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP)\r\n        / TCP(\r\n            sport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT,\r\n            dport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT,\r\n            flags=\"PA\",\r\n            seq=server_isn,\r\n            ack=client_isn,\r\n        )\r\n        / Raw(resp1)\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    server_isn += len(resp1)\r\n    ts += 0.02\r\n    # Request 2\r\n    req2 = b\"GET /second HTTP/1.1\\r\\nHost: example.com\\r\\nConnection: keep-alive\\r\\n\\r\\n\"\r\n    p = (\r\n        Ether()\r\n        / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP)\r\n        / TCP(\r\n            sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT,\r\n            dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT,\r\n            flags=\"PA\",\r\n            seq=client_isn,\r\n            ack=server_isn,\r\n        )\r\n        / Raw(req2)\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    client_isn += len(req2)\r\n    ts += 0.02\r\n    # Response 2\r\n    resp2 = b\"HTTP/1.1 200 OK\\r\\nContent-Length: 5\\r\\n\\r\\nworld\"\r\n    p = (\r\n        Ether()\r\n        / IP(src=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP, dst=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP)\r\n        / TCP(\r\n            sport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT,\r\n            dport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT,\r\n            flags=\"PA\",\r\n            seq=server_isn,\r\n            ack=client_isn,\r\n        )\r\n        / Raw(resp2)\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    server_isn += len(resp2)\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    # FIN from server\r\n    p = (\r\n        Ether()\r\n        / IP(src=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP, dst=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP)\r\n        / TCP(\r\n            sport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT,\r\n            dport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT,\r\n            flags=\"FA\",\r\n            seq=server_isn,\r\n            ack=client_isn,\r\n        )\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    server_isn += 1\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    # FIN-ACK from client\r\n    p = (\r\n        Ether()\r\n        / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP)\r\n        / TCP(\r\n            sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT,\r\n            dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT,\r\n            flags=\"FA\",\r\n            seq=client_isn,\r\n            ack=server_isn,\r\n        )\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    client_isn += 1\r\n    wrpcap(str(path), packets)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef generate_http2_pcap(path: Path) -> None:\r\n    \"\"\"Create http2_minimal.pcap: one TCP flow with HTTP/2 client preface and minimal SETTINGS + HEADERS + DATA.\"\"\"\r\n    Ether, IP, TCP, Raw, wrpcap = _get_scapy()\r\n    # Build HTTP/2 bytes: preface + SETTINGS (empty) + HEADERS (minimal request) + DATA\r\n    preface = b\"PRI * HTTP/2.0\\r\\n\\r\\nSM\\r\\n\\r\\n\"\r\n    try:\r\n        import h2.config\r\n        import h2.connection\r\n\r\n        config = h2.config.H2Configuration(client_side=True)\r\n        conn = h2.connection.H2Connection(config=config)\r\n        conn.initiate_connection()\r\n        data_to_send = conn.data_to_send()\r\n        # Request: GET / HTTP/2\r\n        stream_id = conn.get_next_available_stream_id()\r\n        conn.send_headers(\r\n            stream_id,\r\n            [\r\n                (\":method\", \"GET\"),\r\n                (\":path\", \"/\"),\r\n                (\":scheme\", \"https\"),\r\n                (\":authority\", \"example.com\"),\r\n            ],\r\n            end_stream=True,\r\n        )\r\n        data_to_send += conn.data_to_send()\r\n        client_bytes = preface + data_to_send\r\n    except Exception:\r\n        # Fallback: minimal manual framing (SETTINGS frame type=4, length=0, stream_id=0)\r\n        # 9-byte header: 3 bytes length (0), 1 type (4), 1 flags (0), 4 stream_id (0)\r\n        settings_frame = bytes([0, 0, 0, 4, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0])\r\n        # HEADERS frame for stream 1: type=1, need to HPACK-encode :method GET, :path /\r\n        import hpack\r\n\r\n        encoder = hpack.Encoder()\r\n        encoded = encoder.encode(\r\n            [\r\n                (\":method\", \"GET\"),\r\n                (\":path\", \"/\"),\r\n                (\":scheme\", \"https\"),\r\n                (\":authority\", \"example.com\"),\r\n            ]\r\n        )\r\n        # Frame: length=len(encoded), type=1, flags=5 (END_HEADERS|END_STREAM), stream_id=1\r\n        length = len(encoded)\r\n        headers_frame = (\r\n            bytes([(length >> 16) & 0xFF, (length >> 8) & 0xFF, length & 0xFF, 1, 5, 0, 0, 0, 1])\r\n            + encoded\r\n        )\r\n        client_bytes = preface + settings_frame + headers_frame\r\n    # Server: SETTINGS ack, HEADERS response :status 200, DATA \"ok\"\r\n    try:\r\n        import h2.config\r\n        import h2.connection\r\n\r\n        config = h2.config.H2Configuration(client_side=False)\r\n        sconn = h2.connection.H2Connection(config=config)\r\n        sconn.initiate_connection()\r\n        server_bytes = sconn.data_to_send()\r\n        # Receive client data (preface + frames) to update state\r\n        sconn.receive_data(client_bytes[len(preface) :])\r\n        # Send response\r\n        sconn.send_headers(1, [(\":status\", \"200\")], end_headers=True)\r\n        sconn.send_data(1, b\"ok\", end_stream=True)\r\n        server_bytes = sconn.data_to_send()\r\n    except Exception:\r\n        import hpack\r\n\r\n        encoder = hpack.Encoder()\r\n        encoded = encoder.encode([(\":status\", \"200\")])\r\n        length = len(encoded)\r\n        headers_frame = (\r\n            bytes([(length >> 16) & 0xFF, (length >> 8) & 0xFF, length & 0xFF, 1, 4, 0, 0, 0, 1])\r\n            + encoded\r\n        )\r\n        data_frame = (\r\n            bytes([0, 0, 2, 0, 1, 0, 0, 0, 1]) + b\"ok\"\r\n        )  # length=2, type=0, flags=1 (END_STREAM)\r\n        server_bytes = headers_frame + data_frame\r\n    # Build TCP session with scapy\r\n    packets = []\r\n    ts = 1000000.0\r\n    client_isn = INITIAL_CLIENT_ISN\r\n    server_isn = INITIAL_SERVER_ISN\r\n    # SYN\r\n    p = (\r\n        Ether()\r\n        / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP)\r\n        / TCP(sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, flags=\"S\", seq=client_isn)\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    client_isn += 1\r\n    # SYN-ACK\r\n    p = (\r\n        Ether()\r\n        / IP(src=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP, dst=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP)\r\n        / TCP(\r\n            sport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT,\r\n            dport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT,\r\n            flags=\"SA\",\r\n            seq=server_isn,\r\n            ack=client_isn,\r\n        )\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    server_isn += 1\r\n    # ACK + client bytes (preface + frames)\r\n    p = (\r\n        Ether()\r\n        / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP)\r\n        / TCP(\r\n            sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT,\r\n            dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT,\r\n            flags=\"PA\",\r\n            seq=client_isn,\r\n            ack=server_isn,\r\n        )\r\n        / Raw(client_bytes)\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    client_isn += len(client_bytes)\r\n    ts += 0.02\r\n    # ACK from server (optional) + server bytes\r\n    p = (\r\n        Ether()\r\n        / IP(src=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP, dst=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP)\r\n        / TCP(\r\n            sport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT,\r\n            dport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT,\r\n            flags=\"PA\",\r\n            seq=server_isn,\r\n            ack=client_isn,\r\n        )\r\n        / Raw(server_bytes)\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    server_isn += len(server_bytes)\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    # FIN server\r\n    p = (\r\n        Ether()\r\n        / IP(src=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP, dst=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP)\r\n        / TCP(\r\n            sport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT,\r\n            dport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT,\r\n            flags=\"FA\",\r\n            seq=server_isn,\r\n            ack=client_isn,\r\n        )\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    server_isn += 1\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    # FIN-ACK client\r\n    p = (\r\n        Ether()\r\n        / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP)\r\n        / TCP(\r\n            sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT,\r\n            dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT,\r\n            flags=\"FA\",\r\n            seq=client_isn,\r\n            ack=server_isn,\r\n        )\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    wrpcap(str(path), packets)\r\n"}, "2:LEN": "2e71f048cbfb48ad38154f7a3ed8b467220bdafdeaa9387a58ed191348e8064d", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}, {"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "\"\"\"netprof analyze subcommand.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nimport json\r\nfrom pathlib import Path\r\n\r\nimport typer\r\n\r\nfrom netprof.config import load_config\r\nfrom netprof.models.flow import Flow\r\nfrom netprof.models.transaction import Transaction\r\nfrom netprof.parsers.flow_tracker import FlowTracker\r\nfrom netprof.parsers.pcap_reader import discover_capture_files, read_pcap\r\nfrom netprof.parsers.tcp_reassembly import TCPReassembler\r\nfrom netprof.protocols.grpc import GrpcHandler\r\nfrom netprof.protocols.http1 import HTTP1Handler\r\nfrom netprof.protocols.http2 import HTTP2Handler\r\nfrom netprof.report.errors import ErrorLogger\r\nfrom netprof.report.profile_md import build_profile_md\r\nfrom netprof.report.summary_builder import build_summary\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _capture_file_id(path: Path, index: int) -> str:\r\n    \"\"\"Stable id for correlation (basename or index).\"\"\"\r\n    return path.name or str(index)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _run_protocols(\r\n    c2s_bytes: bytes,\r\n    s2c_bytes: bytes,\r\n    flow_id: str,\r\n    c2s_ts_map: list[tuple[int, float]],\r\n    s2c_ts_map: list[tuple[int, float]],\r\n    errors: ErrorLogger,\r\n) -> list[Transaction]:\r\n    \"\"\"Run protocol handlers in order: HTTP/2 (+ gRPC) or HTTP/1.1. Return merged transactions.\"\"\"\r\n    http2_handler = HTTP2Handler()\r\n    grpc_handler = GrpcHandler()\r\n    http1_handler = HTTP1Handler()\r\n    if http2_handler.detect(c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes):\r\n        http2_txns = http2_handler.parse(c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, flow_id, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map)\r\n        grpc_txns = grpc_handler.parse(c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, flow_id, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map)\r\n        grpc_streams = {(t.flow_id, t.stream_id) for t in grpc_txns if t.stream_id is not None}\r\n        out = []\r\n        for t in http2_txns:\r\n            if (t.flow_id, t.stream_id) in grpc_streams:\r\n                continue\r\n            out.append(t)\r\n        out.extend(grpc_txns)\r\n        return out\r\n    if http1_handler.detect(c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes):\r\n        return http1_handler.parse(c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, flow_id, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map)\r\n    return []\r\n\r\n\r\ndef analyze_cmd(\r\n    pcap_path: Path = typer.Argument(..., help=\"Path to PCAP/PCAPNG file or directory\"),\r\n    out: Path = typer.Option(..., \"--out\", help=\"Output directory\"),\r\n    config: Path | None = typer.Option(None, \"--config\", help=\"Optional YAML config path\"),\r\n) -> None:\r\n    \"\"\"Analyze PCAP/PCAPNG and write summary, flows, transactions, profile.md, errors.log.\"\"\"\r\n    settings = load_config(config)\r\n    out_path = Path(out)\r\n    out_path.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\r\n    errors = ErrorLogger(out_path)\r\n    try:\r\n        files = discover_capture_files(Path(pcap_path))\r\n        if not files:\r\n            typer.echo(f\"No capture files found at {pcap_path}\", err=True)\r\n            raise typer.Exit(1)\r\n        reassembler = TCPReassembler(\r\n            max_bytes_per_direction=settings.reassembly_buffer_per_flow_bytes\r\n        )\r\n        all_flows: list[Flow] = []\r\n        all_transactions: list[Transaction] = []\r\n        for file_index, path in enumerate(files):\r\n            capture_file_id = _capture_file_id(path, file_index)\r\n            tracker = FlowTracker(\r\n                capture_file_id=capture_file_id,\r\n                flow_idle_timeout_sec=settings.flow_idle_timeout_sec,\r\n                concurrency_bucket_seconds=settings.concurrency_bucket_seconds,\r\n            )\r\n            try:\r\n                for (\r\n                    ts,\r\n                    src_ip,\r\n                    dst_ip,\r\n                    src_port,\r\n                    dst_port,\r\n                    protocol,\r\n                    payload,\r\n                    tcp_seq,\r\n                    tcp_flags,\r\n                ) in read_pcap(path):\r\n                    for flow, segments in tracker.ingest(\r\n                        ts,\r\n                        src_ip,\r\n                        src_port,\r\n                        dst_ip,\r\n                        dst_port,\r\n                        protocol,\r\n                        payload,\r\n                        tcp_seq,\r\n                        tcp_flags,\r\n                    ):\r\n                        c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map, truncated = (\r\n                            reassembler.reassemble(segments)\r\n                        )\r\n                        if truncated:\r\n                            errors.log(\r\n                                \"Reassembly truncated\", flow_id=flow.flow_id, detail=\"buffer limit\"\r\n                            )\r\n                        all_flows.append(flow)\r\n                        txns = _run_protocols(\r\n                            c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, flow.flow_id, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map, errors\r\n                        )\r\n                        all_transactions.extend(txns)\r\n            except Exception as e:\r\n                errors.log(f\"Error processing {path}: {e}\")\r\n            for flow, segments in tracker.flush_idle():\r\n                c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map, truncated = reassembler.reassemble(\r\n                    segments\r\n                )\r\n                if truncated:\r\n                    errors.log(\"Reassembly truncated\", flow_id=flow.flow_id, detail=\"buffer limit\")\r\n                all_flows.append(flow)\r\n                txns = _run_protocols(\r\n                    c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, flow.flow_id, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map, errors\r\n                )\r\n                all_transactions.extend(txns)\r\n        # Write flows.jsonl\r\n        with open(out_path / \"flows.jsonl\", \"w\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\r\n            for flow in all_flows:\r\n                f.write(flow.to_jsonl_line() + \"\\n\")\r\n        # Write transactions.jsonl\r\n        with open(out_path / \"transactions.jsonl\", \"w\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\r\n            for t in all_transactions:\r\n                f.write(t.to_jsonl_line() + \"\\n\")\r\n        # Summary and profile\r\n        summary = build_summary(\r\n            all_flows,\r\n            all_transactions,\r\n            top_talkers_n=settings.top_talkers_n,\r\n            top_destinations_n=settings.top_destinations_n,\r\n            top_ports_n=settings.top_ports_n,\r\n        )\r\n        with open(out_path / \"summary.json\", \"w\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\r\n            f.write(json.dumps(summary.model_dump(), indent=2))\r\n        profile_md = build_profile_md(summary, all_transactions)\r\n        with open(out_path / \"profile.md\", \"w\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\r\n            f.write(profile_md)\r\n        typer.echo(\r\n            f\"Wrote {out_path}: {len(all_flows)} flows, {len(all_transactions)} transactions.\"\r\n        )\r\n    finally:\r\n        errors.close()\r\n"}, "2:LEN": "e94c0bc55b725e22b878f966af7cd3745748cda59c45345adfd1dcf2a077df5c", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}, {"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "# Netprof configuration example.\r\n# Use with: netprof analyze <pcap> --out <dir> --config config.yaml\r\n\r\n# Max bytes per flow per direction for TCP reassembly (default: 1MiB)\r\nreassembly_buffer_per_flow_bytes: 1048576\r\n\r\n# Max active flows before eviction (default: 50000)\r\nmax_active_flows: 50000\r\n\r\n# Consider flow closed after this many seconds without packets (default: 60)\r\nflow_idle_timeout_sec: 60.0\r\n\r\n# Time bucket size in seconds for concurrency timeline (default: 1.0)\r\nconcurrency_bucket_seconds: 1.0\r\n\r\n# Top-N sizes for summary\r\ntop_talkers_n: 10\r\ntop_destinations_n: 10\r\ntop_ports_n: 10\r\n"}, "2:LEN": "148f612183042f8015a3ead84cb7225763b3f893a7a57908d84a4b68a0be07de", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": {"1:LEN": "."}, "4:VARINT": 1}, {"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "# Netprof Makefile (use with make or nmake /f Makefile on Windows with GNU make)\r\n\r\n.PHONY: test lint analyze-fixtures install\r\n\r\ninstall:\r\n\tpip install -e .\r\n\r\ntest:\r\n\tpytest tests/ -v\r\n\r\nlint:\r\n\truff check netprof tests\r\n\t-mypy netprof --ignore-missing-imports\r\n\r\nanalyze-fixtures: install\r\n\tnetprof fixtures generate -o fixtures\r\n\tnetprof analyze fixtures --out out_fixtures\r\n\tnetprof summarize out_fixtures\r\n"}, "2:LEN": "1e8603184ff05724a77a7e94b9a4ce1a3aba705aadf42fa5d105fe3edae24c2d", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": {"1:LEN": "."}, "4:VARINT": 1}, {"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "# Netprof: Offline Network Traffic Collector and Behavior Profiler\r\n\r\nNetprof ingests PCAP/PCAPNG files, reconstructs TCP flows, extracts application-layer transactions (HTTP/1.1, HTTP/2, gRPC) when plaintext, and produces machine-readable artifacts plus a human-readable report.\r\n\r\n## Quickstart\r\n\r\n```bash\r\npip install -e .\r\nnetprof analyze sample.pcap --out out\r\nnetprof summarize out\r\nnetprof fixtures generate -o fixtures   # create synthetic test fixtures\r\n```\r\n\r\n## CLI\r\n\r\n- **`netprof analyze <pcap_path> --out <output_dir> [--config config.yaml]`**  \r\n  Analyzes a file or directory of `.pcap`/`.pcapng` files. Writes:\r\n  - `out/summary.json` – top talkers, destinations, ports, flow peaks, latency percentiles\r\n  - `out/flows.jsonl` – one JSON object per flow\r\n  - `out/transactions.jsonl` – one JSON per HTTP/gRPC transaction\r\n  - `out/profile.md` – human-readable report\r\n  - `out/errors.log` – parse errors and skipped parsing reasons\r\n\r\n- **`netprof summarize <output_dir>`**  \r\n  Recomputes summary from `flows.jsonl` and `transactions.jsonl` and prints key metrics (and overwrites `summary.json`).\r\n\r\n- **`netprof fixtures generate [--output dir]**  \r\n  Creates deterministic synthetic PCAP fixtures under `fixtures/` (or the given directory) for tests.\r\n\r\n## What Can and Cannot Be Parsed (TLS)\r\n\r\n- **Encrypted (TLS) traffic:** Application-layer payload cannot be decrypted. Netprof still produces **flow-level profiling**: timing, byte counts per direction, packet counts, estimated RTT, and concurrency over time.\r\n- **Plaintext traffic:** HTTP/1.1, HTTP/2, and gRPC (over HTTP/2) are parsed when the payload is in the clear. Transactions, latency, and endpoints are extracted.\r\n\r\n## Correlation IDs\r\n\r\n- **`flow_id`:** Stable hash of the canonical 5-tuple plus capture file id. The 5-tuple is normalized so the same flow from either direction yields the same id: endpoints are ordered (e.g. `ip:port` lexicographically), then `SHA256(ep1|ep2|protocol|capture_file_id)` is truncated to 16 hex chars.\r\n- **`txn_id`:**  \r\n  - HTTP/1.1: `flow_id + \"_\" + transaction_index` (sequential per connection).  \r\n  - HTTP/2 / gRPC: `flow_id + \"_s\" + stream_id`.\r\n\r\n## Performance and Memory\r\n\r\n- **Streaming:** PCAP is read via an iterator; the file is not loaded entirely into memory.\r\n- **Bounded memory:**  \r\n  - Per-flow TCP reassembly is limited to `reassembly_buffer_per_flow_bytes` per direction (default 1 MiB).  \r\n  - The number of active flows is capped by `max_active_flows` (default 50,000); excess flows are evicted and noted in `errors.log`.\r\n- For large directories, processing is file-by-file; use a reasonable `flow_idle_timeout_sec` so idle flows are closed and memory is released.\r\n\r\n## Extending with New Protocols\r\n\r\n1. Add a module under `netprof/protocols/` (e.g. `myproto.py`).\r\n2. Implement the same interface as existing handlers:\r\n   - `name` (property): protocol name\r\n   - `detect(c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes) -> bool`\r\n   - `parse(c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, flow_id, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map) -> list[Transaction]`\r\n3. Register the handler in the analyze pipeline (e.g. in `cli/analyze.py`) and run it in the desired order (e.g. after HTTP/2, before HTTP/1.1).\r\n4. Document the new protocol and any config in this README.\r\n\r\n## Assumptions\r\n\r\n- **Flow timeout:** A flow is considered closed after `flow_idle_timeout_sec` (default 60s) with no packets.\r\n- **Capture file id:** For directory input, the basename (or index) of each file is used in `flow_id` to avoid collisions across files.\r\n- **PCAPNG:** dpkt’s `UniversalReader` is used when available; if PCAPNG fails on your platform, only `.pcap` is supported (see README or `errors.log`).\r\n- **Latency:** For HTTP, latency is time to first response byte minus time of first request byte (TTFB-style).\r\n- **Top ports:** Reported as destination ports and flow counts unless configured otherwise.\r\n\r\n## Development\r\n\r\n```bash\r\npip install -e \".[dev]\"\r\nmake test    # pytest\r\nmake lint    # ruff + mypy (mypy may be partial)\r\nmake analyze-fixtures\r\n```\r\n\r\n## License\r\n\r\nMIT.\r\n"}, "2:LEN": "3ea2a33e21cbf1e2a3b74b12ee534276eeddb253feb1c767d8d061d93738fb23", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": {"1:LEN": "."}, "4:VARINT": 1}, {"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN":
